case_title: EK, EDGAR VILLAREAL VS. LIVING COLLECTIONS INC., et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EK, EDGAR VILLAREAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIVING COLLECTIONS INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION LIVING COLLECTIONS, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP TANG, HING INDIVIDUALLY AND AS A GENERAL PARTNER OF LIVING COLLECTIONS, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP TANG, MINH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS A GENERAL PARTNER OF LIVING COLLECTIONS, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP $12,226.51 PRINCIPAL, $51.54 INTEREST, $375.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,653.05, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
